name: Bayou DeSiard Country Club
description: Bayou DeSiard Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Monroe, LA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, locker rooms, and food.
fees: Members only — Must be a member of the club. Ok to bring guests for $10/guest

name: First Baptist Calhoun
description: Come play pickleball at First Baptist Calhoun in Calhoun, LA! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Monroe Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Monroe Athletic Club in Monroe, LA! There are 10 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, restrooms, food, locker rooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Sterlington Rec Center
description: Sterlington Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Sterlington, LA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: West Monroe Sports & Events
description: Come play pickleball at West Monroe Sports & Events in West Monroe, LA! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Days are subject to change, and most players leave by about 11 am.
fees: Members only — $10 per month per person cash to Pelican Pickleball Club (come to get info)
